case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MANUEL ELEAZAR MENDOZA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, MANUEL ELEAZAR MENDOZA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00); DOCUMENT STAMPED: "VIA FAX FILE". SERVED SEP-23-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, MANUEL ELEAZAR MENDOZA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, MANUEL ELEAZAR MENDOZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MANUEL ELEAZAR MENDOZA GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.
